files.notes: The file contains two distinct articles: 'Notes from the Field' by Amy Brown Lyman covering mission reports from various conferences, and 'Lessons for January' which includes theology, work/business, literature, and social service lessons. The second article appears to include some advertising content at the end.

files.notes: This file contains 4 lesson sections merged together. The lessons cover Theology, Work/Business/Literature, and Social Service topics. There appears to be some content missing between Lesson II and Lesson IV (no Lesson III section found as a separate entity, though literature content is embedded in Lesson II section). The file includes introduction material, detailed lesson content, poetry, and questions/problems sections for each lesson.
